caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, pointed grey wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a "LEE" branded garment. To the left and right, on-screen graphics display a microphone icon with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" underneath. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts slightly as he continues talking, his mouth moving and eyes blinking. He remains seated in the same position throughout the clip, with the camera maintaining a steady medium shot of his upper body against the cluttered, artistic backdrop of the studio.
